Maleek Taiwo

UI/UX Designer & Webflow Developer

Hi, I'm Maleek. I design and build functional websites that solve real user problems. I focus on keeping interfaces clean, understanding what the user actually needs, and writing solid code to bring those ideas to life on the web.

Tools & Expertise

Webflow Development

I don't just build in Webflow — I architect scalable, CMS-driven sites using the Client-First framework, Finsweet attributes, and custom code integrations. Every build is optimized for performance, SEO, and client independence.

Client-First Framework•Finsweet Attributes•CMS Architecture•Custom Animations•Webflow Ecommerce•Reverse Proxy•SEO Optimization•Memberstack•Zapier Integration•Responsive Breakpoints•Webflow Hosting•Dynamic Filtering•Client-First Framework•Finsweet Attributes•CMS Architecture•Custom Animations•Webflow Ecommerce•Reverse Proxy•SEO Optimization•Memberstack•Zapier Integration•Responsive Breakpoints•Webflow Hosting•Dynamic Filtering•

My Process

Every project follows a proven framework — from strategy to launch, no shortcuts.

01
01

Discovery & Strategy

I start by asking the right questions, not just what you want the site to look like, but what it needs to accomplish. From there, I create a structural blueprint designed specifically to drive results, whether that means more sales, leads, or engagement.

02
02

UI/UX Design in Figma

I design high-fidelity interfaces in Figma with obsessive attention to typography, spacing, and hierarchy. Every layout decision is intentional. You get a design that is distinctly yours, not a template with your logo slapped on.

03
03

Webflow Development

I build the final product in Webflow using the Client-First framework for clean, scalable architecture. Your site loads fast, works flawlessly across devices, and is structured so you can manage content independently.

04
04

Custom Code & Launch

When the project demands more, I extend Webflow with custom JavaScript, CSS animations, and third-party integrations. After rigorous QA and optimization, we launch — and I stick around to make sure everything runs smooth.

Selected Feedback

What clients say after we ship.

01
“Maleek didn't just build our website, he understood the business problem first. The result was a site that actually converts visitors into booked calls. Traffic stayed the same, but leads doubled.”
AB

Aisha Bello

Founder, Vantage Point

02
“Working with Maleek felt like having a creative partner, not just a developer. He challenged our initial brief, pushed for better UX decisions, and delivered something far beyond what we imagined.”
DO

Daniel Okoro

Creative Director, Hayes Valley Studio

03
“Most designers hand you a Figma file and disappear. Maleek designed it, built it in Webflow, optimized it for speed, and made sure we could manage content ourselves. The whole package.”
FA

Funmi Adeyemi

Co-founder, Melons Finance
